nodes.label: AI as reference and composition aid
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable generator with deformities

nodes.label: AI as time-saving creative assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as time-wasting when it misinterprets

nodes.label: AI as threat to artist livelihood
nodes.grounding_span: people and companies trying to abuse AI by using it as a replacement for artists

nodes.label: Creative efficiency and productivity

nodes.label: Artistic integrity and skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: artists and creatives like myself who've spent years training and honing our skills

nodes.label: Creative control and intentionality
nodes.grounding_span: I just feel I have less control once I've told the AI what I'm looking for

nodes.label: Iterative guided prompting with expectation of deviation
